title: Gear Second Changes the Fight
description: Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Spandam, Zoro, Luffy, Blueno, Nico Robin. Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What!!? His swords seem to be bending.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's move, the path's clear now.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ... and why isn't he the captain?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why're you guys starting a fight there!!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Wait up, zero, that's not the way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shut up!! Your Explana-tion was bad!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: A good medicine for a hopeless idiot.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: I wonder if Bro will be okay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They'll do fine when the time comes.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Don't ignore me, the presiding judge ____!!

summary: Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.
